channel.title: Norman Li on Norman Li — Systems, decisions, outcomes
channel.description: Recent content in Norman Li on Norman Li — Systems, decisions, outcomes

item.title: Finding the inventory hiding in plain sight
item.description: A practical segmentation model that gives planners a credible, prioritised action queue.

item.title: Forecast accuracy is not enough
item.description: Why bias tells a more useful operational story—and how to act on it.

item.title: An analytics copilot that cites its work
item.description: A safer path from natural-language questions to trusted business answers.

item.title: Three inventory signals I check first
item.description: A compact diagnostic sequence for finding the real source of inventory imbalance.

item.title: AI answers need an evidence trail
item.description: Designing AI systems that people can verify before they act.

item.title: Safety stock
item.description: What safety stock is, what it protects against, and where common formulas fail.

item.title: Forecast bias
item.description: A directional measure that surfaces systematic under- or over-forecasting.

item.title: ABC–XYZ analysis
item.description: Combining value and variability to select differentiated planning policies.

item.title: Semantic layers
item.description: How shared metric definitions create more reliable self-service analytics.
